title: Skill Marketplace Registry
description: A centralized registry of community-contributed skills with versioned SKILL.md validation.

registry_version.description: Semver version of the registry document format.

skills.description: Registered skills. Each entry points at a skill directory containing a SKILL.md.

name.description: Skill name; must match the SKILL.md frontmatter 'name'.

version.description: Semver version; must match the SKILL.md frontmatter 'version'.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the skill directory.

description.description: Short human-readable summary of the skill.

sha.description: Optional content hash for integrity verification.
